title: Onboarding - Eula page - License Agreement and Privacy Policy links when the internet is turned off
scenario: Onboarding EULA page shows "Something went wrong" when tapping License Agreement or Privacy Policy links with no internet, and Cancel returns to onboarding screen
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on a fresh install (or after clearing app data) to reach the onboarding flow.
On the 'Well hello, first things first...' screen (EULA page), turn off internet (Wi-Fi and mobile data) on the device.
Tap the 'Cancel' button on the error screen.
Observe the screen you return to.
Tap the 'Cancel' button on the error screen.
Observe the screen you return to.
expected: Tapping either the License Agreement or Privacy Policy link should open the respective document in an in-app browser or web view. If there is no internet, the app should show a clear offline/network error message with an option to retry or dismiss, and dismissing should return the user to the EULA/onboarding screen.
